A clear description of the bug.

What you expected instead.

- fuko-pr version / commit:
- Python version:
- Deployment mode: homelab (Postgres) / managed DB / server-free (sqlite-vec + S3/R2)
- Reviewer backend + model provider:

Relevant output — **redact tokens and keys**.
